utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey Rach , wanna hear the new song I am thinkin of singing this afternoon ? I wrote it this morning in the shower .

emotion_cause.span: 1_the new song I am thinkin of singing this afternoon ? I wrote it this morning in the shower .

utterances.speaker: Terry
utterances.text: Uh , Rachel , sweetheart , could I see you for a minute ?

utterances.speaker: Terry
utterances.text: I have decided to pay a professional musician to play in here on Sunday afternoons .

utterances.speaker: Terry
utterances.text: She is supposed to be very good .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I have decided to pay a professional musician to play in here on Sunday afternoons .

utterances.speaker: Terry
utterances.text: Rachel , it is not that your friend is bad , it is that she is so bad , she makes me want to put my finger through my eye into my brain and swirl it around .

emotion_cause.span: 10_she is so bad , she makes me want to put my finger through my eye into my brain and swirl it around .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ok , ok , so you are not a fan , but I mean , come on , you cannot do this to her .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , no no no no . Oh no no no no . I have to do this to her ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_I have to do this to her
